description: A vintage-style illustrated travel poster showing a stylized North African hillside town of densely packed ochre and orange buildings with a tall minaret, palm fronds in the foreground and a pale cloudy sky. Large cream-colored text at the top reads Fly to ALGERIA with a smaller line reading for FREE! A line at the bottom reads DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
notable_text: Fly to ALGERIA for FREE!; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
